title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude AI was used to visualize the cognitive patterns and decision-making processes of Williams F1 drivers and team members under race pressure. The visualizations, called Pattern of Thought, were rendered on helmets and race suits, debuting at Monaco.
